title: senecio oehleri
intro: Senecio oehleri is a plant species, also known as Jacob's ladder, which belongs to the daisy family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been found to have hepatotoxic effects and should be used with caution. Despite the potential risks, Senecio oehleri is believed to have various health benefits, including its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be strictly monitored and guided by a medical professional due to its potential toxicity.
